title: Remove selected image and two card elements from BrideGroomEntrySection and related section

requirements.text: Remove the image element located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[7]/div[1]/div[3]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1] from the BrideGroomEntrySection. This is an img tag inside the third card's inner div — remove the img element entirely.
acceptanceCriteria: The image element inside the third card of BrideGroomEntrySection (section[7]) is no longer rendered.
The rest of the card content remains intact and layout is not broken.

requirements.text: Remove the fourth card/div element located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[8]/div[1]/div[2]/div[4]/div[1] from section[8] (the section immediately following BrideGroomEntrySection). Delete the entire div[4] entry from the grid/list in that section.
acceptanceCriteria: The fourth card/item in section[8]'s content grid is no longer rendered.
The surrounding cards and layout remain intact.

requirements.text: Remove the fifth card/div element located at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[8]/div[1]/div[2]/div[5]/div[1] from section[8]. Delete the entire div[5] entry from the grid/list in that section.
acceptanceCriteria: The fifth card/item in section[8]'s content grid is no longer rendered.
The surrounding cards and layout remain intact.

constraints: Only remove the three specified elements; do not alter any other content or styling.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restructuring any sections beyond the three targeted element removals.
Adding new content or replacing the removed elements with alternatives.
